description: Spanish Fork 17 offers unique programming combining LIVE local broadcasts as well as features that uniquely represent Spanish Fork City. As a gem of our community, SF17 is dedicated to offering local content not otherwise available. Our focus is to provide relevant coverage of local news, LIVE sports, music, politics, civic clubs, and a myriad of topics as well as entertaining local personalities and events. Spanish Fork 17 is now available for streaming LIVE at any time as well as on YouTube. In addition, you may download any of our content for your personal enjoyment.
subject: public access television
Utah
title: Spanish Fork Channel 17
